commit.message: Added a test site to test markdown rules.
Added a create site script and base files for all sites. Improved deploy script to include site changes and commit message. Improved style of serve and setup scripts.
Fixed the code in task 1 so it matches the instructions for analyse, spin right, increase speed tasks.
Added lazy loading to edpy youtube videos.
Added EdPy resource page and video tutorials page. Fixed two duplicated code blocks.
Updated portal links and design / python links.
Improved naming of design titles to be clearer.
Added selection in the event loop resource.
Added image buttons to the portal.
Added the iteration event loop python page.
Updated setup script to include python environment and updated README.
Added an image to tinkercad resource page.
Added double diamond develop and deliver page.
Added design thinking resource and linked it to class activities.
Added 2 resources and 3 tasks to the design site.
Added comments to mkdocs.yml files to guide authoring.
Added styling for return to portal link in nav.
Added return to portal navigation link.
Remove old docs folder for GH pages.
Changed structure to support multi-site serving and deployment.
Forgot to include push in deployment script.
Improved readability of page and nav bar.
Slight corrective for random beeping task, task 7.
Fixed deploy script adding wrong docs folder.
Renamed build script to deploy and added automatic commit.
Fix up attempt task button for task 2.
Added instruction at the top of tasks to reduce repeated instruction.
Update authoring doc with page/nav guide.
Added python dependencies install script and README.
Added edpy upload video and updated build.
Fix numbering for headings and update build.
Added python task 1 and updated build.
Added helpers scripts and generated build.
